questions.template: What is the centripetal acceleration of an object moving at {v} m/s in a circle of radius {r} m?
A {m} kg object moves in a circle of radius {r} m at {v} m/s. What is the centripetal force?
A car of mass {m} kg travels around a curve of radius {r} m at {v} m/s. What is the centripetal force?
A satellite moves in a circular orbit with period {T} seconds and radius {r} m. What is its centripetal acceleration?
